title: Node Collection - Get prime images
user_story:
As an API consumer\
I want to be able to bulk-request the prime images for a bunch of nodes\
So I don't have to request them one by one
description:
* the user provides the nodes as comma-separated list of IDs
* the user can provide one or multiple node IDs, but not zero
* the prime images are determined for each node individually 
  * the goal is NOT to find an image that is connected to all of the given nodes
* when any of the given nodes has no prime image then it will be ignored in the response
* when none of the given nodes have a prime image then an empty list is returned
* the response returns an unordered list of matching image nodes
